case_title: GRACE MARIE MCKENNA VS. AUTUMN NICOLE SMITHERS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-18-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GRACE MARIE MCKENNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICOLE SMITHERS IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE HEARING. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE JAN-18-2019 HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED OCT-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITHERS, AUTUMN NICOLE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY MCKENNA, GRACE MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITHERS, AUTUMN NICOLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MELIFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
